entries.name: mfa-purge-unconfirmed-enrollments
entries.purpose: Every 5 minutes: evict expired enrolment-preview envelopes from Redis. Complements the natural Redis TTL — the TTL guarantees deletion but this job additionally fires the MfaEnrollmentFailed(reason=preview_expired) event so metrics + audit see the abandonment.

entries.name: mfa-notify-low-recovery-codes
entries.purpose: Nightly at 09:00 UTC: dispatch LowRecoveryCodesRemainingNotification to Identities with fewer than the low-water threshold codes remaining who haven't been notified in the last 30 days.

entries.name: mfa-cleanup-disabled-webauthn-credentials
entries.purpose: Daily at 05:00 UTC: hard-delete WebauthnCredential rows whose disabled_at + retention_days_after_disable < now(). Scheduled an hour after identity/identity's PurgeSoftDeletedIdentitiesJob (04:00 UTC) so any cascade-purged credentials from erasure have flushed first.

entries.name: mfa-active-webauthn-credentials-gauge
entries.purpose: Every 5 minutes: emit the count of active WebauthnCredentials for the dashboard.

entries.name: mfa-identities-with-mfa-gauge
entries.purpose: Every 5 minutes: emit fleet-wide MFA-adoption gauge.

entries.name: mfa-recovery-codes-distribution-gauge
entries.purpose: Every minute: emit the histogram of recovery-code counts across MFA-enrolled Identities. Enables alert on left-tail growth.

entries.name: mfa-identities-required-but-missing-gauge
entries.purpose: Every 5 minutes: emit the compliance-violation count (Identities holding required-for-roles roles but without MFA past grace).

entries.name: mfa-suspicious-activity-scheduler-heartbeat
entries.purpose: Every minute: emit a heartbeat so `mfa-suspicious-activity-scheduler-alive` health probe can detect stalls.
